libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For version 5.0.0, write tests using Jackson 3 types, especially tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode, not com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode. Exercise Swagger2Module through a SchemaGeneratorConfigBuilder with annotated sample classes. No Docker image, environment variable, or system property setup is indicated.

deterministic_setup.reason: jsonschema-module-swagger-2 extends and configures jsonschema-generator APIs, but the artifact declares jsonschema-generator with provided scope; meaningful tests should instantiate SchemaGenerator with Swagger2Module.
The module derives schema attributes from Swagger 2.x annotations such as @Schema and @ArraySchema, but swagger-annotations is declared with provided scope in the module POM.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8739 [Automation] javac compile fails for com.github.victools:jsonschema-module-swagger-2:5.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Copying the existing 4.38.0 tests without updating Jackson imports will reproduce the javac failure because 5.0.0 uses Jackson 3 packages.
Without the provided-scope companion dependencies, tests may compile only scaffold-level code or fail before reaching meaningful module behavior.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The module is only an integration module and its required generator and Swagger annotation APIs are declared as provided, so the normal single-artifact scaffold is not enough for meaningful compileable coverage.
